Under RBI's supervisory framework, non-compliance with Treasury requirements can result in regulatory censure, financial penalties, and reputational harm. This control operationalises the institution's commitment to regulatory adherence and risk management.
interpreted_controls.control_summary: [LOW] Treasury & Investment Control — Authorisation Control is a governance control supporting the 'Treasury & Investment Control' business capability. Implementation follows the 'Workflow Creation' pattern and is owned by the Risk function. Compliance is verified through manual audit.
